name: Contact
description: Contact page matching the Stitch Luminous Curator design — editorial intro + contact form

fields.heading: Let's start a conversation.
fields.body:
Have a question, a partnership idea, or just want to see if VibeCMS is right for your team? We read every message. Whether you're a solo creator, an agency scaling to dozens of sites, or an enterprise evaluating a migration, our curators will respond within one business day.

Every great project begins with a well-framed question. We're listening.

For urgent or commercial inquiries, reach our team directly using any of the channels below.

fields.heading: Let's talk.
fields.subheading: Ready to elevate your content experience? Our team of curators is here to guide your transition to VibeCMS.

items.question: What is the typical timeline for a new project?
items.answer: Most projects launch within 4 to 8 weeks depending on scope. Simple brochure sites can go live in as little as two weeks, while complex multi-language platforms may take longer.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: We offer flexible plans based on site traffic and feature requirements. Every plan includes the full block editor, theme engine, and core CMS features.

items.question: Can I migrate from my existing CMS?
items.answer: Absolutely. We provide migration tools and services for WordPress, Drupal, and other popular platforms.
